mapper.insert:
SELECT plant_seq.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO plant ( plantno, memberno, plant_name, plant_type, growth, points, intro_completed ) VALUES ( #{plantno, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{memberno, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{plant_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{plant_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{growth, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{points, jdbcType=INTEGER}, 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM plant WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY created_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE plant SET growth = CASE WHEN growth + #{growth} > 100 THEN 100 ELSE growth + #{growth} END WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plant WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
SELECT memberno, item_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM item_usage_log WHERE memberno = #{memberno} AND TRUNC(used_at) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) GROUP BY memberno, item_type
SELECT NVL(SUM(growth_after - growth_before), 0) FROM plant_growth_log WHERE plantno = #{plantno} AND TRUNC(change_date) = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO plant_growth_log (logno, plantno, growth_before, growth_after, reason, change_date) VALUES (plant_growth_log_seq.NEXTVAL, #{plantno}, #{growthBefore}, #{growthAfter}, #{reason}, SYSDATE)
